# UDA Pulse
> The free mobile-first UDA tracker for NHS dentists in England

UDA Pulse is a React Native mobile app (iOS + Android) for NHS dental associates, locum dentists, salaried dentists, and mixed/private practitioners. It tracks Units of Dental Activity (UDAs) in real time, calculates tax, generates invoices, and helps prevent NHS clawback.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://udapulse.co.uk — Landing page with features, FAQs, download links
- User Guide: https://udapulse.co.uk/guide/ — How to track UDAs, clawback prevention, 2026/27 NHS contract guide, comparisons, FAQ, glossary
- NHS Contract Guide: https://udapulse.co.uk/nhs-contract-guide/ — Comprehensive 2026/27 NHS dental contract reference with band values, contract reform changes, Compass reporting
- Privacy Policy: https://udapulse.co.uk/privacy-policy/ — UK GDPR compliant, all data stored locally
- Terms of Service: https://udapulse.co.uk/terms/ — Terms and conditions including subscription terms

## Core Features

- Real-time UDA tracking with progress ring and pace alerts
- Voice Quick Add — say "two Band 2s" to log hands-free (offline)
- 20 private treatment categories with orthodontics and implant stage tracking
- Practice plan integration (Denplan, Practice Plan) with tier-based fee tracking
- Monthly invoice generation with PDF and XLSX export
- Tax calculator: income tax, NI Class 2/4, student loan, VAT threshold monitoring
- Multi-practice dashboard with per-practice targets and aggregate stats
- Home screen widgets (iOS + Android) in 4 sizes
- Cloud backup (iCloud on iOS, Google Drive on Android) with cross-platform migration
- NHSBSA Compass report import (DCS127, DCS129, SD86c)
- PMS CSV import (Dentally, EXACT, SFD)
- Industry benchmarks from NASDAL data
- CPD tracking toward GDC 100-hour requirement
- Siri shortcuts and Google Assistant integration

## Technical Details

- Version: 6.0.0
- Platforms: iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play)
- Data: Stored locally on device (SQLite), no server required
- Privacy: UK GDPR compliant, no patient data collected
- Pricing: Free core features, £4.99/month premium

## Download

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/uda-pulse/id6757474721
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.kartikdatla.udapulse
